1st blug

Fri Mar 20 2026 10:30:00 GMT-0400 (Eastern Daylight Time)

My first blogpost is dedicated to my dad and the story of when he, mom ,and my toddler brother went to the park and an unleashed dog started running towards them and how he kicked it away like it was a stray ball. I imagine it sailing over everyone’s heads over trees and lakes and bridges until it squeaked at the owner’s feet.
